---
marp: true
theme: default
paginate: true
---

<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap');

/* ─── Base ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
section {
  background: #ffffff;
  color: #1e293b;
  font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
  font-size: 21px;
  padding: 52px 68px;
  position: relative;
}

/* ─── Header hierarchy ──────────────────────────────────── */
h1 {
  font-size: 2.3em;
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1.15;
  margin-bottom: 0.25em;
  color: #5b21b6;
}

h2 {
  font-size: 1.65em;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #5b21b6;
  margin-bottom: 0.45em;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #ede9fe;
  padding-bottom: 0.3em;
}

h3 {
  font-size: 1.0em;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #0e7490;
  margin-bottom: 0.3em;
  margin-top: 0.8em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}

p {
  line-height: 1.75;
  color: #334155;
  font-size: 1em;
}

ul {
  padding-left: 1.2em;
  list-style: none;
}

ul li {
  padding: 0.35em 0;
  color: #334155;
  position: relative;
  padding-left: 1.4em;
  font-size: 1em;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

ul li::before {
  content: "▸";
  color: #7c3aed;
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  font-size: 0.9em;
  top: 0.42em;
}

strong {
  color: #1e293b;
  font-weight: 700;
}

/* ─── Pagination ────────────────────────────────────────── */
section::after {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #94a3b8;
  font-weight: 500;
}

/* ─── Horizontal rule ───────────────────────────────────── */
hr {
  border: none;
  height: 2px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #7c3aed, #0e7490, transparent);
  margin: 1em 0;
}

/* ─── COVER ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
section.cover {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 64px 80px;
  background: linear-gradient(160deg, #f5f3ff 0%, #ecfeff 50%, #f8fafc 100%);
}

section.cover h1 {
  font-size: 3.0em;
  color: #3b0764;
  margin-bottom: 0.25em;
}

section.cover .tagline {
  font-size: 1.2em;
  color: #475569;
  font-weight: 400;
  max-width: 680px;
  line-height: 1.7;
  margin-bottom: 2em;
}

section.cover .logo-lockup {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  margin-bottom: 2em;
}

section.cover .company {
  font-size: 1.1em;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #1e293b;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

section.cover .divider-bar {
  width: 80px;
  height: 4px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #7c3aed, #0e7490);
  border-radius: 2px;
  margin-bottom: 1.8em;
}

section.cover .confidential {
  font-size: 0.8em;
  color: #94a3b8;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

/* ─── SECTION HEADER ─────────────────────────────────────── */
section.section-header {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 64px 80px;
  background: linear-gradient(160deg, #f5f3ff 0%, #ecfeff 100%);
}

section.section-header h1 {
  font-size: 2.7em;
  color: #3b0764;
}

section.section-header .section-num {
  font-size: 0.75em;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #a78bfa;
  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 0.6em;
}

/* ─── PILLARS GRID ───────────────────────────────────────── */
.pillars-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 16px;
  margin-top: 1em;
}

.pillar {
  background: #fafafa;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-top: 3px solid #7c3aed;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 18px 20px;
}

.pillar.cyan {
  border-top-color: #0e7490;
}

.pillar .pillar-num {
  font-size: 0.65em;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #94a3b8;
  letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 0.5em;
}

.pillar h3 {
  font-size: 0.9em;
  margin: 0 0 0.5em 0;
  text-transform: none;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  color: #1e293b;
}

.pillar p {
  font-size: 0.82em;
  color: #64748b;
  line-height: 1.55;
  margin: 0;
}

/* ─── CARDS ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.cards-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 14px;
  margin-top: 0.8em;
}

.card {
  background: #f8fafc;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 18px 22px;
}

.card h3 {
  font-size: 0.9em;
  margin: 0 0 0.4em 0;
  text-transform: none;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  color: #5b21b6;
}

.card p {
  font-size: 0.85em;
  color: #475569;
  margin: 0;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

/* ─── TIMELINE ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
.timeline {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 12px;
  margin-top: 1em;
}

.week {
  background: #f8fafc;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 18px 16px;
}

.week-badge {
  font-size: 0.68em;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #0e7490;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  margin-bottom: 0.6em;
  display: block;
}

.week h3 {
  font-size: 0.9em;
  color: #1e293b;
  margin: 0 0 0.5em 0;
  text-transform: none;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.week p {
  font-size: 0.8em;
  color: #64748b;
  margin: 0;
  line-height: 1.55;
}

/* ─── FAILURE PATTERNS ──────────────────────────────────── */
.failure-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-top: 1em;
}

.failure-item {
  background: #fff5f5;
  border: 1px solid #fecaca;
  border-left: 4px solid #ef4444;
  border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
  padding: 13px 18px;
  font-size: 0.88em;
  color: #1e293b;
  line-height: 1.5;
}

/* ─── PROFILE ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
section.profile {
  background: linear-gradient(160deg, #f5f3ff 0%, #ecfeff 100%);
}

.profile-content {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto 1fr;
  gap: 40px;
  align-items: start;
  margin-top: 0.8em;
}

.profile-avatar {
  width: 110px;
  height: 110px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7c3aed, #0e7490);
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 2.2em;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #ffffff;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(124, 58, 237, 0.25);
}

.profile-meta .name {
  font-size: 1.5em;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #1e293b;
  margin-bottom: 0.2em;
}

.profile-meta .title {
  font-size: 0.95em;
  color: #7c3aed;
  margin-bottom: 1em;
  font-weight: 600;
}

/* ─── CTA ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
section.cta {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 64px 80px;
  background: linear-gradient(160deg, #f5f3ff 0%, #ecfeff 50%, #f0fdf4 100%);
  text-align: center;
}

section.cta h1 {
  font-size: 2.8em;
  margin-bottom: 0.5em;
  color: #3b0764;
}

section.cta p {
  font-size: 1.1em;
  max-width: 640px;
  margin: 0 auto 1.5em;
  color: #475569;
}

section.cta .contact-info {
  display: inline-flex;
  gap: 20px;
  margin-top: 1.5em;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: center;
}

section.cta .contact-item {
  background: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 14px 28px;
  font-size: 1.0em;
  color: #475569;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
}

section.cta .contact-item span {
  color: #7c3aed;
  font-weight: 700;
}

/* ─── SLIDE LOGO (top right on content slides) ─────────── */
.slide-logo {
  position: absolute;
  top: 26px;
  right: 68px;
  opacity: 0.55;
}
</style>

<!-- _class: cover -->

<div class="logo-lockup">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="64" height="64" alt="Flowcraft Systems" style="display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;" />
  <div class="company">Flowcraft Systems</div>
</div>

# Enterprise AI Transformation & Enterprise Readiness Advisory

<div class="divider-bar"></div>

<div class="tagline">
Helping software product companies successfully sell, deploy, govern, and scale AI-enabled products inside enterprise environments.
</div>

<div class="confidential">Confidential — Prepared for Prospective Clients</div>

---

<!-- _class: section-header -->

<div class="section-num">The Challenge</div>

# The Enterprise AI Gap

<hr/>

<p style="font-size: 1.15em; max-width: 700px; color: #334155; line-height: 1.85;">
Most companies know how to <strong>build software.</strong><br/>
Far fewer know how to satisfy enterprise buyers who demand <strong style="color: #5b21b6;">security, compliance, governance, auditability, resilience, and operational maturity.</strong>
</p>

<p style="margin-top: 1.5em; font-size: 1.1em; color: #1e293b;">
The underlying issue is rarely technology capability.<br/>
<strong style="color: #7c3aed;">It is systems design and organizational readiness.</strong>
</p>

---

<div class="slide-logo">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="40" height="40" alt="Flowcraft Systems" style="display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;" />
</div>

## Who We Serve

Our clients are companies at the intersection of engineering ambition and enterprise demands.

<div class="cards-grid" style="grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; margin-top: 1.2em;">

<div class="card">
<h3>SaaS & AI-Native</h3>
<p>SaaS companies selling into enterprises and AI-native startups moving from pilots to production</p>
</div>

<div class="card">
<h3>Regulated Industries</h3>
<p>Product companies entering healthcare, financial services, and compliance-sensitive markets</p>
</div>

<div class="card">
<h3>Engineering Leaders</h3>
<p>Leaders under pressure to accelerate AI adoption responsibly without sacrificing delivery velocity</p>
</div>

</div>

<p style="margin-top: 1.5em; font-size: 0.9em; color: #94a3b8; font-style: italic;">
Whether you are at Series A or scaling past $10M ARR — if enterprise deals are on the table, we can help you win them.
</p>

---

<div class="slide-logo">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="40" height="40" alt="Flowcraft Systems" style="display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;" />
</div>

## Common Failure Patterns

Seven patterns we see repeatedly — across industries, company sizes, and technology stacks.

<div class="failure-grid">

<div class="failure-item">AI deployed without governance or accountability structures</div>
<div class="failure-item">Compliance programs that create drag without reducing real risk</div>
<div class="failure-item">Enterprise deals blocked or stalled by security reviews</div>
<div class="failure-item">Platform engineering debt disguised as AI problems</div>
<div class="failure-item">No observability into AI agents and automated workflows</div>
<div class="failure-item">Inability to prove what happened during audits</div>
<div class="failure-item" style="grid-column: span 2;">Architecture decisions that do not scale with enterprise adoption curves</div>

</div>

---

<!-- _class: section-header -->

<div class="section-num">Our Framework</div>

# The Enterprise AI Readiness Framework

<hr/>

<p style="font-size: 1.05em; color: #475569; max-width: 680px; line-height: 1.75;">
Six interconnected pillars that give your product, engineering, and go-to-market teams a shared language for enterprise readiness — and a clear path to close the gaps.
</p>

---

<div class="slide-logo">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="40" height="40" alt="Flowcraft Systems" style="display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;" />
</div>

## Framework: Infrastructure to Governance

<div class="pillars-grid">

<div class="pillar">
  <div class="pillar-num">Pillar 01</div>
  <h3>Platform Foundations</h3>
  <p>Identity, access management, observability, deployment pipelines, environments, and secrets management</p>
</div>

<div class="pillar">
  <div class="pillar-num">Pillar 02</div>
  <h3>Security & Compliance</h3>
  <p>HIPAA, GDPR, auditability, data governance, retention, encryption, and operational controls</p>
</div>

<div class="pillar cyan">
  <div class="pillar-num">Pillar 03</div>
  <h3>AI Governance</h3>
  <p>Model governance, agent governance, provenance, evaluation, guardrails, and accountability</p>
</div>

</div>

<p style="margin-top: 1.2em; font-size: 0.85em; color: #94a3b8; font-style: italic;">Pillars 1–3 build the foundation enterprise buyers verify before signing.</p>

---

<div class="slide-logo">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="40" height="40" alt="Flowcraft Systems" style="display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;" />
</div>

## Framework: Scale to Business Outcomes

<div class="pillars-grid">

<div class="pillar cyan">
  <div class="pillar-num">Pillar 04</div>
  <h3>Enterprise Architecture</h3>
  <p>Multi-tenancy, resilience, integrations, scalability, and operational readiness at enterprise scale</p>
</div>

<div class="pillar">
  <div class="pillar-num">Pillar 05</div>
  <h3>Adoption & Change</h3>
  <p>Leadership alignment, operating models, engineering workflows, and customer assurance programs</p>
</div>

<div class="pillar">
  <div class="pillar-num">Pillar 06</div>
  <h3>Business Outcomes</h3>
  <p>Revenue enablement, enterprise deal acceleration, risk reduction, and operational leverage</p>
</div>

</div>

<p style="margin-top: 1.2em; font-size: 0.85em; color: #94a3b8; font-style: italic;">Pillars 4–6 ensure what you build translates into durable enterprise revenue and trust.</p>

---

<div class="slide-logo">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="40" height="40" alt="Flowcraft Systems" style="display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;" />
</div>

## Representative Outcomes

Work spanning large-scale platforms, AI transformation programs, and enterprise trust initiatives.

- Led engineering and architecture for large-scale multi-tenant SaaS platforms serving regulated industries
- Guided AI adoption programs that balanced innovation velocity with governance and operational controls
- Designed observability approaches for AI-assisted software development and autonomous AI agents
- Helped engineering organizations improve delivery velocity while maintaining enterprise buyer trust
- Supported enterprise architecture, security, and governance conversations with customers and stakeholders
- Built frameworks connecting AI activity, operational outcomes, and measurable business value

<hr/>

<p style="font-size: 0.88em; color: #94a3b8; margin-top: 0.5em;">
19+ years across software engineering, product development, enterprise architecture, platform engineering, and AI transformation.
</p>

---

<div class="slide-logo">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="40" height="40" alt="Flowcraft Systems" style="display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;" />
</div>

## Engagement Models

<div class="cards-grid">

<div class="card">
<h3>Enterprise Readiness Assessment</h3>
<p>2–4 week assessment covering architecture, security, governance, compliance, and enterprise adoption blockers</p>
</div>

<div class="card">
<h3>AI Governance Strategy</h3>
<p>Governance models, observability, agent controls, auditability, and risk management frameworks</p>
</div>

<div class="card">
<h3>Fractional CTO / Architecture Advisor</h3>
<p>Strategic guidance for scaling products, engineering organizations, and AI transformation initiatives</p>
</div>

<div class="card">
<h3>Enterprise Deal Readiness</h3>
<p>Preparation for security reviews, architecture reviews, and enterprise customer due diligence</p>
</div>

</div>

<div class="card" style="margin-top: 12px; border-left: 3px solid #0e7490; border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;">
<h3 style="color: #0e7490;">AI-Native Engineering Transformation</h3>
<p>Helping teams adopt AI-assisted engineering practices safely, effectively, and at scale</p>
</div>

---

<div class="slide-logo">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="40" height="40" alt="Flowcraft Systems" style="display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;" />
</div>

## First 30 Days

A structured onboarding built for clarity, not complexity.

<div class="timeline">

<div class="week">
  <span class="week-badge">Week 1</span>
  <h3>Discovery</h3>
  <p>Stakeholder interviews, goals alignment, and context gathering</p>
</div>

<div class="week">
  <span class="week-badge">Week 2</span>
  <h3>Assessment</h3>
  <p>Architecture, platform, security, and governance deep dive</p>
</div>

<div class="week">
  <span class="week-badge">Week 3</span>
  <h3>Gap Analysis</h3>
  <p>Risk identification, prioritization, and quick-win mapping</p>
</div>

<div class="week">
  <span class="week-badge">Week 4</span>
  <h3>Roadmap</h3>
  <p>Executive briefing, implementation plan, and operating model</p>
</div>

</div>

<hr/>

**Deliverables:** Current-state assessment · Risk register · Prioritized roadmap · Executive briefing · Recommended operating model

---

<div class="slide-logo">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="40" height="40" alt="Flowcraft Systems" style="display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;" />
</div>

## Founder Profile

<div class="profile-content">

<div class="profile-avatar">VM</div>

<div class="profile-meta">
  <div class="name">Vibhor Mahajan</div>
  <div class="title">Founder, Flowcraft Systems</div>

  <p style="font-size: 0.95em; margin-bottom: 1em;">Over a career spanning more than <strong>19 years</strong>, Vibhor has operated across software engineering, product development, enterprise architecture, platform engineering, AI transformation, and technology leadership.</p>

  <p style="font-size: 0.95em; margin-bottom: 1em;">His work focuses on helping organizations navigate the intersection of engineering velocity, enterprise trust, AI governance, security posture, compliance requirements, and long-term scalability.</p>

  <p style="font-size: 0.92em; color: #7c3aed; font-style: italic;">Known for bringing systems thinking, strategic clarity, and execution discipline to complex technology transformation initiatives.</p>
</div>

</div>

---

<!-- _class: cta -->

<div style="margin-bottom: 1.5em;">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="68" height="68" alt="Flowcraft Systems" style="display: block; margin: 0 auto 0.8em;" />
</div>

# Let's Talk

<p>If you're navigating enterprise AI adoption, preparing for security reviews, or need a strategic partner who has done this before — we'd like to hear about your situation.</p>

<div class="contact-info">
  <div class="contact-item"><span>Web</span> &nbsp; flowcraft.systems</div>
